top3.sql:
SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(ball_control) 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') 
    - 
    (SELECT AVG(ball_control) 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS difference;

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(ball_control) 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') 
    - 
    (SELECT AVG(ball_control) 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS difference;

SELECT 
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN pa.ball_control END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN pa.ball_control END) AS difference
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name IN ('Abdou Diallo', 'Aaron Appindangoye');

SELECT 
    (SELECT AVG(ball_control) 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') 
    - 
    (SELECT AVG(ball_control) 
     FROM Player_Attributes pa 
     JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id 
     WHERE p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS difference;

WITH player_ball_control AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_name,
        AVG(pa.ball_control) AS avg_ball_control
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
    WHERE p.player_name IN ('Abdou Diallo', 'Aaron Appindangoye')
    GROUP BY p.player_name
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_ball_control FROM player_ball_control WHERE player_name = 'Abdou Diallo') -
    (SELECT avg_ball_control FROM player_ball_control WHERE player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye') AS differ...

SELECT 
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN pa.ball_control END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN p.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN pa.ball_control END) AS difference
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.player_name IN ('Abdou Diallo', 'Aaron Appindangoye');
